blocks.body: Future Simple — will + V1 for decisions made now, promises, offers, and predictions.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"Future Simple uses will + V1 and has the same form with every subject.","rules":[{"label":"Forms","color":"emerald","text":"Use will + V1 in affirmative sentences.","example":"I will call. / She will help."},{"label":"Negatives and Questions","color":"blue","text":"Negative: won't + V1; question: Will + subject + V1?","example":"He won't wait. / Will they come?"},{"label":"Main uses","color":"amber","text":"Decisions made now, promises, offers, and opinion-based predictions.","example":"I'll answer it. / I think it will rain."}]}

{"title":"1. Lessons in order","intro":"Start with forms, then study negatives, questions, time expressions, and the contrast with be going to.","items":[{"label":"A1–A2","title":"Forms and Use","subtitle":"will + V1 and its main uses.","rules":[{"label":"All subjects","formula":"will + V1","text":"The form is the same for every subject.","example":"I will work. / They will work."}]},{"label":"A1–A2","title":"Negatives","subtitle":"will not / won't + V1.","rules":[{"label":"Negative","formula":"won't + V1","text":"Keep the main verb in its base form.","example":"She won't be late."}]},{"label":"A1–A2","title":"Questions and Short Answers","subtitle":"Will you...? Yes, I will. / No, I won't.","rules":[{"label":"Question","formula":"Will + subject + V1?","text":"Put will before the subject.","example":"Will you help me?"}]},{"label":"A1–A2","title":"Time Expressions","subtitle":"tomorrow, next week, soon, one day.","rules":[{"label":"Future time","formula":"tomorrow / next...","text":"Time markers specify a future moment.","example":"I'll call you tomorrow."}]},{"label":"A2–B1","title":"Will vs Be Going To","subtitle":"A decision made now versus an existing plan.","rules":[{"label":"Meaning","formula":"will vs going to","text":"Choose the form by meaning.","example":"I'll help. / I'm going to study tonight."}]}]}

{"title":"2. Where Future Simple is used","sections":[{"label":"Decision made now","color":"emerald","description":"The decision is made while speaking.","examples":[{"en":"The phone is ringing. I'll answer it.","ua":"A spontaneous decision."}]},{"label":"Promises and offers","color":"blue","description":"Will is natural in promises, offers, and requests.","examples":[{"en":"I'll help you.","ua":"An offer."}]},{"label":"Prediction or opinion","color":"amber","description":"Use will for a prediction without present evidence.","examples":[{"en":"I think they will win.","ua":"An opinion-based prediction."}]}]}

{"title":"3. In short","items":["Future Simple = will + V1.","Negative = will not / won't + V1.","Question = Will + subject + V1?","The form is the same for every subject.","For an existing plan, be going to is often better."]}
